summary: Iteration 22 Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All backend and frontend features working correctly. Tested: 1) Property creation/update with clean payload (no extra fields), 2) Saved procedures endpoints, 3) Bookmark buttons on property and procedure cards, 4) Map z-index fix (header stays on top), 5) Unified favorites page with tabs, 6) Favicon shows Nimba logo, 7) No emergent references in source code.

backend_api: POST /api/properties - Creates property with clean payload (no extra fields like id, author_id, price_converted)
PUT /api/properties/:id - Updates property with clean payload
GET /api/saved-procedures - Returns list of saved procedures (auth required)
GET /api/properties - Returns list with filters working
frontend_ui: Homepage loads with Nimba logo in header
/immobilier page shows Estimation button when not logged in
/immobilier page hides Favoris/Alertes buttons when not logged in
/immobilier page shows Favoris/Alertes buttons when logged in
/immobilier page shows save/bookmark buttons on property cards when logged in
/immobilier/carte map z-index is 1, header z-index is 50 - header stays on top
/sauvegardes (favorites) page shows 4 tabs: Tout, Articles, Annonces, Procedures
/procedures page shows bookmark buttons on procedure cards when logged in
/immobilier/publier form loads correctly for agent user with all fields
No 'emergent' or 'emergentagent' references found in frontend source code

critical_code_review_comments: PropertyFormPage.js correctly builds clean payload with only expected fields (title, type, price, currency, etc.) - no spreading of form state that included computed fields
PropertyCard.js and ProcedureCard.js correctly implement save toggle with useState/useEffect pattern for logged-in users
index.css correctly sets .leaflet-container z-index: 1 to keep map below header
SavedArticlesPage.js properly unified as favorites page with TABS constant for all content types
index.html cleaned of all emergent references - only posthog analytics and tailwind CDN (for iframe) remain
seed_data_creation: No permanent seed data created - all TEST_ prefixed properties cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 validated all bug fixes: 1) PropertyFormPage sends clean payload without computed fields - fixed Pydantic validation errors, 2) Bookmark buttons appear on PropertyCard and ProcedureCard when user logged in, 3) Map z-index set to 1 via CSS override in index.css, 4) Favicon uses nimba-logo.png from /public folder, 5) SavedArticlesPage renamed conceptually to unified favorites page with tabs for articles/properties/procedures, 6) All emergent references removed from index.html and source code.
